hotel_name: Khách sạn Pullman Saigon Centre (Pullman Saigon Centre Hotel)

reviews.title: Disappointed
reviews.text:
I had a very disappointing stay at Pullman Hotel in Saigon. While the hotel presents itself as a premium property, the experience did not meet expectations at all.

The biggest issue is the location near the walking street, which makes the hotel extremely noisy, especially at night. The constant loud music, traffic, and crowd noise continue late into the night, making it almost impossible to get proper rest. This is unacceptable for a hotel that is supposed to offer comfort and quality.

Soundproofing appears to be inadequate, as the noise easily carries into the rooms. For business travelers or anyone looking for a quiet and restful stay, this hotel is not suitable.

Overall, I would not recommend staying here unless you are prepared to tolerate significant noise disruption throughout the night.

reviews.title: Not worth it
reviews.text:
I recently booked a stay at Pullman Saigon, drawn by its luxurious reputation and promising amenities. Unfortunately, the reality fell short of expectations, leaving much to be desired.

To begin with, the customer service was not up to the mark for a hotel of this stature. The check-in process was cumbersome, and the staff appeared disorganized and uninterested in assisting guests. There was a distinct lack of warmth and hospitality that one would expect from a high-end hotel.

The room, while spacious, was not as pristine and well-maintained as depicted on the hotel’s website. The furniture showed signs of wear and tear, and the overall aesthetic felt dated. The air conditioning was erratic, making it difficult to have a comfortable night's sleep.

reviews.title: Rude Staff, Bugs in the room
reviews.text: We requested to move to the other side of the hotel for a more preferred view of the city and we specifically wanted the Deluxe King rather than the Superior with 2 Twin. They manage to put the 2 twin together to make a king but there's a bump in the middle that makes it uncomfortable. We also didn't want the upgrade that they supposedly give us for free as the superior room with their half wall hanging down from the ceiling in the bath area is very dangerous for kids to bump their heads. My daughter hit her head twice on this. When asked to move, the staff keep stringing us along and couldn't give a clear answer if they have the room without this dangerous design. On our fourth day of our stay we found bugs in the bed and that pretty much ruined it for us. I've stayed at a lot of hotels both in the US and internationally, and I can say with confident that if you're looking for a 5 star hotel, this is not it. It is most likely bought rather than earned. a lot of the stuff was run down. If you're in District 1 and is looking for a 5 star hotel experience, trust me, just stay at the Lotte. It is much better quality and the staff is much friendlier.

reviews.title: Extremely Disappointing Stay – Not Worth the Money
reviews.text:
From the moment I walked into the Pullman Saigon, I had a bad feeling. A woman at the front desk was already complaining about her room, which should’ve been my first warning sign. While the check-in staff were polite and helpful, the property itself was shockingly disappointing. My room, although it had a decent view, was much smaller than expected. The overall condition was terrible; it felt dingy and neglected, with chipped walls, scratched furniture, and a torn, faded couch that had clearly been patched up instead of replaced. The curtains were so old and stiff they barely moved when I tried to close them, and sanitation was clearly not a priority. Tv cabinet was had lot of dust specially around drawers a peanuts were lying there Cleanliness and upkeep are important to me, and this hotel failed badly on both counts.  Worst of all, I found a cockroach in the room. I informed Lobby they got the room cleaned and sent us the apology note with some fruits. 
The location is central, close to the city center and walking distance to bar street, but that’s about the only positive I can mention. I didn’t try the food, and honestly, I didn’t want to. For a hotel that claims to be five star, this is completely unacceptable it barely qualifies as a three-star experience. If the stay hadn't been prepaid, I would have checked out the same day. This place is far too expensive for what it offers. I absolutely would not recommend Pullman Saigon to anyone
reviews.response:
Dear Shagufta,

Thank you for sharing your feedback regarding your recent stay at Pullman Saigon Centre. I truly regret to hear that your experience did not meet your expectations and that you encountered several issues during your visit.

I apologize for the condition of your room and the cleanliness concerns you raised. Please know that we take such matters very seriously, and your comments will be shared with our housekeeping team to ensure that improvements are made. It is disappointing to learn that the ambiance and upkeep of your accommodation did not reflect the standards we strive to uphold.

I appreciate your recognition of our staff's politeness and helpfulness during your check-in. However, I understand that the overall experience fell short of your expectations. Your feedback is invaluable as we continually work towards enhancing our services and facilities.

Thank you once again for your comments, and I hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back under better circumst

Staff was fully aware of this at check in and no information about changing room. However we were disturbed 3 times within 30 min asking if we wanted to extend our stay due to lack of communication. We travel a lot and usually have good experiences but this has been super disappointing for a five star hotel in Asia. So unfortunately we can’t recommend staying at this hotel.

reviews.title: room for improvement
reviews.text:
This was our first trip to Ho Chi Minh City, and we chose this hotel as many five-star hotels were fully booked during the Christmas season.

The hotel is not located in the city centre, but this was acceptable for us as we relied on Grab for transportation. Given the heavy traffic and limited pedestrian-friendly walkways in Ho Chi Minh City, using ride-hailing services was more convenient, so staying slightly further out was not an issue.

However, there were a few disappointments during our stay. On Christmas Day afternoon, only 2 out of 4 lifts were operational, which was very inconvenient as we were staying on the 24th floor. In addition, we had booked the hotel’s seafood buffet dinner for 27 December 2025 through the hotel system, but only discovered upon arrival that the restaurant on the 3rd floor was closed. There was no prior notification or signage, which was quite frustrating.

On a positive note, the room was spacious and clean. That said, there is still room for improvement before the hotel can truly meet a five-star standard.
reviews.response:

reviews.title: Left Pretty Disappointed
reviews.text:
We were on a beautiful honeymoon trip with my husband and travelling for the first time in Vietnam. The last couple of days we decided to spoil ourselves and check in at Pullman Saigon. Boy were we disappointed. Our room was average for a 200+ per night tag. 

At check, general information about where to locate the pool area and or other amenities was not provided to us. We asked the gentleman that helped us with our bags and seemed more helpful in that space. 

On entering our room, we were left disappointed.  Sink was stained, lights on the ceiling were flickering continuously, shower would change its own temperature from cold to warm and not enough amenities were provided as a standard room amenity for 2 persons. It felt like this room was an out of service room that was allocated to us at the last minute to yield a bit more revenue.

We had engineering in our room fixing our shower late into the night which was a major inconvenience to us. We were promised that since it was late, they would look into the lights the next day while we were out. On the 2nd day we went out, only to come back to the same flickering lights and our drying towels removed from our room. On calling reception to tell them we were missing drying towels, they proceeded to ask us if we needed them and that left us dumbfounded.

All in all the stay was really poor and based on the price tag I would not say it was worth it at all for us unfortunately. It looked like we did not look like a premium guest so we got little to no service.
reviews.response:
Dear Kudzai,

Warmest greetings from Pullman Saigon Centre!

It was our pleasure to have you here stayed with us for your recent trip in Saigon.

On behalf of the management team, please accept my sincere apologies for all the inconveniences that affected your sojourn at the hotel.

About the missing information provided at check in time, it probably falls into the lack of communication. We will remind the team to be more mindful and attentive in communication. And of course, the basic information of the hotel must be informed at check in. 

About the flickering light, the stained sink, the unfunctional hot water system are clearly the lack of our attention to details. For sure we will work closely with the Housekeeping Team in order to reinforce the room maintenance and cleanliness as we always understand it's standard for 5-star hotels.

The miscommunication also got reflected on how the information of missing towels was processed. I'm deeply sorry for any inconveniences it caused.

reviews.title: Phục vụ quá tệ
reviews.positives: Vị trí, tiện nghi, sạch sẽ
reviews.negatives:
Cách phục vụ quá tồi tệ không đáng tiêu chuẩn 5 sao. 
Thứ 1: Chúng tôi đã đi Rất mệt sau 1 chuyến bay dài, nhưng khi đến chúng tôi không được chào đón. Việc khách sạn quan tâm duy nhất là chuyển tiền phòng, và yêu cầu bắt buộc đặt cọc 8 triệu để đề phòng phát sinh. Chúng tôi không có tiền mặt chúng tôi đề nghị chuyển khoản cho khoản đặt cọc nhưng khách sạn không đồng ý và đề nghị chúng tôi phải đi rút tiền mặt nộp cho khách sạn. 
Thứ 2: tôi có 1 bạn đến vào ngày sau, tôi đã thông tin đầy đủ cho nhân viên. Khi bạn tôi đến họ đã không cho check in. Khi tôi báo lại ,1 nhân viên nam cố tranh luận với tôi là anh ta trực ca đấy và không nhận được thông tin từ tôi, tuy nhiên tôi xuống làm việc trực tiếp thì họ trao đổi do họ không trao đổi thông tin giữa các ca làm việc. 
Thứ 3: Chúng tôi quên điện thoại trong vali hành lý bỏ đi. Chúng tôi đã cố liên hệ rất nhiều lần, chỉ có bộ phận tổng tài nghe máy
 tuy nhiên họ không giúp được và nói tôi cho thông tin để quản lý gọi cho tôi. Tuy nhiên anh ta rất lần chần và tôi đã cố liên hệ rất nhiều lần tiếp theo, họ còn đề nghị tôi gửi email. Cuối cùng sau rất nhiều lần liên lạc thì a quản lý cũng gọi cho tôi nói là không tìm được và mong tôi thông cảm

Yours Sincerely,

Nguyen Dam Dieu Anh
Assistant Guest Experience Manager

reviews.title: Good Location
reviews.text:
The staff was friendly and welcoming, and the location was convenient. However, overall cleanliness could be improved.

Two things left us quite disappointed:

Room Comfort—Despite requesting a king-size bed, we were given two single beds joined together. The middle gap was very uncomfortable, and the pillows were oddly square-shaped instead of the standard size (20 x 26 inches), making it difficult to sleep well.

Dining Experience at MadCow (30th Floor)—Our dinner experience was frustrating. We waited over 30 minutes only to find out that our order had been completely left out by the kitchen. Other tables that arrived after us were served first, and there was no apology or acknowledgment from the staff.

Overall, while the hospitality was pleasant, the service and room comfort fell short of the Pullman standard we expected.
reviews.response:
Dear Allen,

Thank you for sharing your feedback regarding your recent stay with us. It is heartening to know that you found our location convenient and our staff welcoming. However, I regret to learn that your experience did not fully meet the high standards we strive to uphold.

I sincerely apologize for the discomfort you experienced with the bed arrangement and the pillows. It is our goal to provide a restful environment, and I appreciate your comments on this matter. Additionally, I am disappointed to hear about the dining experience at MadCow. Timely service and attention to our guests' needs are essential, and I assure you that your concerns will be communicated to our team for future improvements.

We value your feedback as it helps us enhance our services. Thank you once again for your insights, and I hope you will consider staying with us again in the future.

Yours Sincerely,

Nguyen Dam Dieu Anh
Assistant Guest Experience Manager

reviews.positives: The room was spacious, modern  and clean
reviews.negatives: I didn’t like anything about this stay, it has to have been one of the worst hotels I’ve ever stayed at and would urge anyone booking here to think twice. Essentially the room was fine and view great from the 21st floor, however I barely got any sleep at all due to some band playing music till gone 4am in the morning and then starting again at 7am. Having raised this with the manager she said they have contact the local authorities about this on the night in question but were unable to do anything about it. As a gesture of good will they offered to waver one nutri bar used within the room which was disgusting and I didn’t even eat, and offered me a discount on future stays!! I explained I would never return so that offer was pointless, that’s all she was willing to do. As far as I’m concerned I was ripped off, after all the only reason you book a room is to sleep and if you don’t get any sleep what’s the point in offering this as a service. reviews.text:
PULLMAN is not located at the ideal location in Saigon as it is not right at the heart of the city. And due to the extreme level of pollution and traffic congestion in Saigon, being just over 1 km away from the heart of the city seems to be a little far.

The staff is extremely friendly and helpful as this is the case across all hotels that we stayed in on this long trip across Vietnam. But the facilities need better maintenance or at least basic checking before guests are admitted to the rooms. We had to call for service 3 times to rectify minor faults over 2 nights stay. 

Out of the three 5-star hotels that we stayed at in Vietnam, PULLMAN has the best service in the breakfast buffet and very good food. Other hotels seem to struggle a lot during the peak period between 8 am to 9 am.

reviews.title: Nice Hotel, Though A Little Bit Souless
reviews.text:
This hotel is quite nice.  The rooms are well kitted out (except the iPhone docking station that is geared up for the iPhone 4).   I enjoyed my stay here, with only two gripes (points 1 and 2):.  

1. The staff in the public areas at the hotel entrance are a bit preoccupied with chatting to each other and you can easily move in and out the hotel without being noticed/acknowledged.  They don't seem to care too much about their guests.

2.  I stayed in an Executive Room for 6 nights.  The breakfast was well prepared for the first 3 days, but then presumably the chef changed shift as it went downhill on day 4.  How can a 5 star hotel have someone in the kitchen that cannot prepare eggs?  The food in the Executive lounge was limited (fair enough) and never changed from day to say.  They just keep wheeling the same stuff out every day.  Probably OK if you are just staying for 1 or 2 nights, but not for longer stays. 
3. They say that you get daily newspapers but I never once received one.
4. The maid comes to the room at 9am, which seems too early and not really in tune with giving guests a relaxing stay (particularly on New Years Day).

The girls on the Executive floor were very pleasant but, in general, this hotel is a bit too clinical and impersonal.  They should send their General Manager to a Crowne Plaza to find out how to make guests feel at home. 

Having said all of this, the hotel is in good condition and the rooms are pleasant.   The world has gone too corporate/formulaic and this hotel is no exception.

reviews.title: Overall stay pleasant thanks to the friendly and attentive staff.
reviews.positives:
The staff were very accommodating with my request for a corner room. They were friendly and helpful throughout my stay. As my partner was feeling unwell, I had the “Do Not Disturb” sign on for more than 24 hours, and the front desk proactively called to check if we needed any assistance, which I truly appreciated.

The location is excellent—just a short walk to the famous Bùi Viện Street.

The hot kettle was faulty and needed to be replaced.

The coffee machine was also not functioning properly. I had it replaced twice, and only the third unit worked

reviews.title: Affordable and good
reviews.text: Pullman has always been a good choice of hotel for people travelling to Asia countries. This hotel is rather new in Saigon and thus it is relatively cheaper than other 5 stars hotel. Location is slightly off town but travelling in Saigon isnt a big problem as taxis are really affordable. We did not have the hotel breakfast as it wasnt included. Room is cosy and nice with a great view. One plus point of this hotel is that its very tall and distinctive.

reviews.text: As we were there for work, we were hardly in the room till late. Breakfast staff can be more attentive towards guest's needs eg: when we arrive no one greeted us and we have to find ourselves a seat. Have to catch the busy staff's attention umpteen times to get our coffee and cutleries even though we have out food on the table. Napkin were not given also and have to ask. All being said, we were in a rush and it wad rush hour in the morning as I felt they were under staff. Generally, the hotel is fine in my opinion. Just have to employ more people to cope with the morning birds rushing out for work.

This is partly compensated by a spectacular view over Saigon. It is strange that in a five star hotel, a double room has only 1 chair in the whole room! The internet type tv is annoying and slow to respond. The bathroom is good with both shower and bathtub. The breakfast that was included is one of the best i have had in any hotel in Saigon. Overall a good hotel, but room is really too small for this price class

Location is near most places, just a short Grab ride away. There is a very small 24hrs convenience store right beside the hotel.

The swimming pool and gym are clean and nice. Staff is also very helpful. I booked 3 rooms and requested for a slightly later check out around 130pm instead of 12pm. Staff agreed to allow us 1 room for late check out.

That was a first. We had a deluxe room for our 3rd night and wanted to keep it for the 4th... We weren't allowed and there was no manager around for that day, Miss Bich assigned us our next room without asking us if we would have liked to pay for the upgrade.... A shame for we ended up transferring after 3pm too late for that room to be resold

reviews.title: Small but clean room
reviews.text:
The location is good for exploring d1 and 5, also for booking Grab. The gym and rooftop bar was good, the latter with excellent views and friendly staff. Check in and out were efficient. When we asked to change rooms (the corner rooms appear smaller because there’s a pillar) they accommodated quickly. Front desk staff were very helpful. 

On the downside, The room is a bit tight for a family of three. At the lobby bar, I ordered a cocktail and wanted to upgrade and pay for a more expensive gin but the staff could not figure out how to ring it up. So i left. On a separate occasion I asked for a quiet place to work and the concierge suggested the small bar beside the pool. I went there and worked for 15 minutes- there was no server and no air conditioning. We also received no fresh towels after they took away the dirty ones.
reviews.response:
Dear Hao,

Thank you for taking the time to tell us about your experience at the Pullman Saigon Centre. I am sorry that your experience did not meet your expectations; please allow me to express my sincerest apologies.

At Pullman, we strive to provide a superior service experience for every customer; therefore your feedback is very important to us. Please rest assured that we are taking the appropriate measures to address the problem and prevent future occurrence.

We appreciate your sharing your concerns, and it is our hope that you will give us the opportunity to better serve you in the near future.

Sincerely,

Nguyen Dam Dieu Anh

Assistant Guest Experience Manager

reviews.title: A comfortable and well-located hotel with excellent service and amenities, though the visitor policy
reviews.positives: The room was spacious and very comfortable, making for a relaxing stay. Breakfast offered a great variety of international options, which I really appreciated. The location is excellent—just a short walk to Bui Vien Walking Street, perfect for enjoying the nightlife without needing to travel far. The hotel staff were friendly, professional, and spoke English very well, which made communication smooth and easy.
reviews.negatives: It would be better if the hotel allowed guests to have visitors stay beyond 11 PM. This policy felt a bit restrictive, especially for those traveling with local friends visiting the hotel guest.

reviews.title: Very good

Also, it is very noisy even though guest stayed on 28th floor.
Otherwise, all good.

Dear Charlene,

Thank you very much for your kind review.

So sorry that your recent stay with us was not met to your expectations. Please be informed that the Accor Member's stay and benefits are only applied for all the direct channels with us. However, I sincerely apologize for the noise issue on the 28th floor.  We will arrange a better room allocation for your next visit. Moreover, I am pleased to be your point of contact for any future return.

We are looking forward to welcoming you back soon.

Yours Sincerely,

Dinh Van Luu
Guest Experience Manager
